// purpose: Wave-3 typecheck leg for backend test files (tsconfig.typecheck.json excludes them; they were typechecked by NOTHING). Run via scripts/typecheck-tests.ts, which composes the dirty-file ratchet (scripts/typecheck-tests-ratchet.json) into a temp child config. paths+rootDirs replicate web/.svelte-kit/tsconfig.json so tests' transitive imports of web modules ($lib/$server/./$types) resolve — without them ~1183 spurious errors. Requires `svelte-kit sync` first (typecheck.sh does).
// noUncheckedIndexedAccess: false = web-flag parity. This program spans src tests AND transitively-imported web product files; web's own program doesn't set the flag, so keeping it on erred web files that are clean in their home leg (agent-color, resource-quotas). Production src stays strict via tsconfig.typecheck.json.
